items.name: ⚫ Shadow Monarch Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Walk between light and darkness with this sleek monochrome coat. Designed with layered fabrics, metallic trims, and flowing details, it captures the aura of a modern sorcerer or elite assassin. The realistic PBR materials give it a cold, reflective finish that stands out in any world.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Stylish black-and-silver color scheme
Layered asymmetrical design with elegant flow
PBR textures for metallic shine and fabric realism
Perfect for mystic, cyberpunk, or dark fantasy avatars
🔍 Keywords: shadow, dark, coat, sorcerer, assassin, futuristic, silver, monochrome, Roblox
Rule the shadows — and look flawless doing it ⚔️

- Don't order a graphic with no detail, or it will be hard for me to complete anything for you and risk me having to decline your order. Remember, no refunds.
- You must order by one of the two options given. Google forms or the in-game application center.
-You may NOT edit my work. Removing the watermark will be stated as stealing and will cause problems, as that is illegal.
- Buy t-shirt first then let me message you on disc or roblox.
- No military graphics!

items.name: Cap
items.description:
🧢 Classic Cap – Clean Style for Every Roblox Avatar

The Classic Cap is a must-have accessory for players who want a simple, cool, and timeless look. Designed to fit perfectly on any avatar, this cap adds instant style without being too flashy.

With its smooth shape and clean details, the cap works great with casual outfits, streetwear, and even competitive game looks. It’s lightweight, stylish, and perfect for everyday Roblox adventures.

⭐ Why this Cap is worth it:

🧢 Clean & Simple Design – Always looks good

👌 Perfect Fit – Comfortable on most avatars

🎮 Great for Any Game – From PvP to roleplay

🔥 Timeless Style – Never goes out of fashion

This cap isn’t just an accessory — it’s a style essential. If you want your avatar to look confident, relaxed, and modern, this cap is the right choice.

👉 Wear the Classic Cap and complete your Roblox look today!

items.description:
T-shirt to supply high quality graphics for outrageously cheap. Everything will be hand drawn on nearly all graphics.
Just Message Details.
-If its a advertisement or and group logo.
-The colors.
-Place or name of the group.
-Type of style. Ex are Retro, Military, Gothic (ect.)
-Any details you'd like added into it.
-If ad's then say rather or no if its a banner, skyscraper, or large rectangle.

items.name: piercing
items.description:
🔥 Welcome to CartoonUgc_V2! 🔥

The ultimate destination for the most unique and high-quality UGC items on Roblox! We specialize in bringing your favorite styles to life with professional designs that make your avatar stand out.

✨ Why Join Us?

Original Designs: Unique accessories you won't find anywhere else.

Top Quality: Detailed textures and perfect fitting for all avatars.

Frequent Drops: New items added regularly!

🛍️ Shop Our Collection:
Check out our store for the latest hats, hair, back accessories, and more!
👉 [Link to Store: https://www.roblox.com/groups/33719917/CartoonUgc-V2#!/store]

⭐ Support Us:

Favorite our items to help us grow!

Wear our UGC and tag us to be featured.

Join the group to stay updated on new releases and exclusive giveaways.

🎨 Created with passion for the Roblox community.

Tags:
UGC, Clothing, Accessories, Aesthetic, Anime, Cartoon, Cheap, Quality, 3D, Items, Group, V2, Limited.
